sections.core: Vendor fees already cover these core operations, but sponsoring them unlocks stories for social media posting.
sections.registry: Sponsor-funded features beyond the vendor baseline. Some upgrades require the matching core ops gift — select it above first.
sections.options: Sponsor perks — sponsor booth spot unlocks at Gold ($2,500+). Tent rental requires sponsor booth spot.

sections.core: Vendor fees, parking, and carnival fund the MVP core (~$40K ops). This baseline runs Sat–Sun 11 AM–5 PM without upgrade sponsors.
sections.registry: Upgrade blocks families remember — parade, talent, decor, Saturday night, and more. Pick the story you want to own.
sections.options: Recognition add-ons and community anchor gifts. Sponsor booth unlocks at Bronze ($3,000+).
